title: Road Patrol System
description: Private roads require patrol to enforce exclusivity. Rivals might use unpatrolled private roads depending on their personality and risk tolerance. Patrolling has ongoing costs but prevents unauthorized use.
definition-of-done: Patrol assignment for private roads. Unpatrolled roads vulnerable to rival use. Rival AI considers risk/personality for using unpatrolled roads. Patrol cost mechanics.
testing-plan: Verify patrol assignment works. Test rival AI decision making for unpatrolled roads. Verify patrol costs applied correctly.
todos: Create detection mechanics for unauthorized use
